# ISSUE_TEMPLATE

## OVERVIEW
GitHub issue templates shown to contributors when opening bug reports or feature requests.

## WHERE TO LOOK
| Task | Location | Notes |
|------|----------|-------|
| Bug reports | `bug_report.md` | Repro steps, expected/actual behavior, environment |
| Feature requests | `feature_request.md` | Problem, proposal, alternatives |

## CONVENTIONS
- Keep GitHub front matter (`name`, `about`, `title`, `labels`, `assignees`) valid.
- Keep forms short enough that contributors will finish them.
- Security disclosures route to `security@october-academy.com`, not public issues.

## ANTI-PATTERNS
- Do not ask for secrets, tokens, private customer data, or full logs that may contain credentials.
- Do not expand templates into long questionnaires; use discussion after filing for depth.

## TESTS
No automated tests. Preview Markdown/front matter when editing templates.

## DEPENDENCIES
- Internal: `../../CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- External: GitHub issue template renderer.
